title: Fix a DataCase that forces every test to be serial
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/data_case_no_async_handling.ex` is a DataCase template that calls `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` in every setup block regardless of the `:async` tag. This makes every test serial. Rewrite the file to `test/support/data_case.ex` using the `shared: not tags[:async]` pattern via `start_owner!/2`, so async-tagged modules get exclusive connections and non-async-tagged modules get shared ones. Include `on_exit` to call `stop_owner`.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that the shared-mode-always pattern is an anti-fix AND producing the canonical alternative. Two-step.
research_citation: "The `shared: not tags[:async]` pattern controls connection ownership" — Rakshan Shetty
